1) INTRODUCTION 
a) Product Name  
 
OMI_CIRCULATION_MOC_BLKSEA_area_averaged_mean. 
 
b) Indicator Evaluation Method 
To understand the overturning circulation of the Black Sea, we compute the residual 
meridional overturning circulation in density space. Residual overturning as a function 
of latitude (𝑦) and density (𝜎̅) bins can be computed as follows: 
 
𝜓∗(𝑦, 𝜎̅) = − 1
𝑇 ∫ ∫ ∫ ℋ[𝜎̅ − 𝜎(𝑥, 𝑦, 𝑧, 𝑡)]
0
−𝐻
× 𝜈(𝑥, 𝑦, 𝑧, 𝑡)𝑑𝑧𝑑𝑥𝑑𝑡,
𝑥𝐵2
𝑥𝐵1
𝑡1
𝑡0
 
 
where ℋ is the Heaviside function and 𝜈 is the meridional velocity. We used 100 𝜎2  
(potential density anomaly with reference pressure of 2000 dbar) density bins to 
remap the mass flux fields.
